I am absolutely terrified of the thought of you losing this election, but if you continue with the reactive stance that is exactly what is going to happen. the Donald Trump who was elected in 2016 would never have let these people get as far as they have with the destruction of our country! it is time to be proactive and take these people down instantly when they break the law.
